description_long: This is a two-seater couch with a boxy, modern silhouette and deep, plush cushions. The upholstery is a dark brown, matte fabric that appears soft and slightly textured, with subtle wear marks visible on the surface. The seat and back cushions are thick and generously padded, providing ample comfort, and are divided into two distinct sections each. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform rectangular profile. The legs are short and mostly hidden, giving the couch a grounded, low-to-the-floor appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, accent pillows, or tufting, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A modern, dark brown two-seater couch with thick, divided cushions and straight, wide armrests. The upholstery is matte and subtly textured, with a low, boxy profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned back panel and the low, solid base of the couch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with visible cushion depth and straight armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large back cushions, all divided and appearing loose but fitted; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown fabric with a matte, slightly textured finish and subtle wear marks; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-style, and mostly hidden beneath the base, likely made of wood or metal; no decorative features visible.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a continuous rectangular profile; no additional padding or decorative elements.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is low to medium height, divided into two large, cushioned sections; appears attached and unadorned, with a simple, modern design.
